name: Central Park
description: Iconic urban park featuring walking paths, lakes, zoo, and various recreational activities.

name: Statue of Liberty
description: Iconic symbol of freedom and democracy, gifted by France in 1886.

name: Empire State Building
description: 102-story Art Deco skyscraper with observation decks offering panoramic views.

name: Brooklyn Bridge
description: Historic hybrid cable-stayed/suspension bridge connecting Manhattan and Brooklyn.

name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
description: One of the world's largest and finest art museums, with over 2 million works.
